CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-IMBALANCE_PO: Accumulate [gold]Imbalance[/gold]. When it reaches half of max HP (up to100), trigger [gold]Weightless[/gold], remove all current [gold]Imbalance[/gold], then lose HP equal to half of the current [gold]Imbalance[/gold]. If it is currently this creature's turn, it is immediately [gold]Stunned[/gold].

Accumulate [gold]Imbalance[/gold]. When it reaches half of max HP (up to100), trigger [gold]Weightless[/gold], remove all current [gold]Imbalance[/gold], then lose HP equal to half of the current [gold]Imbalance[/gold]. If it is currently this creature's turn, it is immediately [gold]Stunned[/gold].
Needs{RemainingToTrigger}[gold]Imbalance[/gold]to trigger [gold]Weightless[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-WEIGHTLESS_P: Receive double damage for3turns. While in this state, gaining [gold]Imbalance[/gold] instead causes equal HP loss.
Receive double damage for{Amount}turns. While in this state, gaining [gold]Imbalance[/gold] instead causes equal HP loss.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-DELIVERY_POW: Sent cards return to your hand at the start of your next turn.

{Amount}cards are queued. At the start of your next turn, these cards return to your hand:
{Cards}
SPELL.title: Spell
SPELL.description: Spell damage and spell Block ignore Strength, Dexterity, Vulnerable, Weak, Frail, and similar modifiers, but are affected by [gold]Focus[/gold].
AIRBORNE.title: Airborne
AIRBORNE.description: A target is considered [gold]Airborne[/gold] while it is in an elevated state. Currently implemented airborne sources include [gold]Fly[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-FLY_POWER.de: Halve incoming attack damage. Lose 1 stack each time you take unblocked attack damage.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-FLY_POWER.sm: Halve incoming attack damage. Lose 1 stack each time you take unblocked attack damage. {Amount} remaining.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-TEMPORARY_FL: Gain that much Fly. Lose this Fly at the start of your next turn.
Gain {Amount} Fly. Lose this Fly at the start of your next turn.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-UPDRAFT_POWE: At the start of your turn, gain 1 Temporary Fly. If you become grounded by an attack, shuffle a Dazed into your draw pile.
At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} Temporary Fly. If you become grounded by an attack, shuffle a Dazed into your draw pile.
